owner.name: Muthuganesh R

bio: Gen AI Developer with 2 years of experience at TCS, specializing in building Geo AI solutions. Skilled in Generative AI, Python, Prompt Engineering, and modern frameworks. Experienced in leading teams, participating in AI hackathons, and delivering innovative solutions.

highlights: Developing and implementing Geo AI solutions leveraging Generative AI and spatial data analysis
Leading a team of developers on AI projects, ensuring timely and efficient delivery
Integrating GIS with Gen AI technologies for enterprise solutions
Applying LangChain, LlamaIndex, and other Gen AI frameworks
Contributing to AI-driven projects and internal innovation initiatives
